title: Luffy Laughs Against Kaido
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Yamato, Unknown person #5, Kaido, Momonosuke, Unknown person #6 as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The Rocks have fallen?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you kidding?! With all the monsters on that crew?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: i heard a marine called GARP beat 'em!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No way, I bet their infighting did them in. None of them were team players...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't screw with me!! Where the hell did you go, Kaido?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 10 years have passed since that incident, Kaido... you're now known as the "embodiment of brutality."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Kyo-Kyo-Kyo-Kyo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: If you study history, humans have always...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...resorted to brutality to solve the world's problems.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But then again, humans are just like any other animal!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Survival of the fittest" is our true nature!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Couldn't...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...Agree more!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: From now on, everything will revolve around the former members of the rocks crew...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Wepons shape the world we live in.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With that in mind, I have a proposition for you... Kyo-kyo- Kyo-kyo!!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Let's show all those "peace loving" nobles...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...The hellish reality of war!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yeah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One's worth can only truly be gaugey in battle....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where everyone is equal and anarchy reigns FREE!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: Yamato mentioned joyboy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not sure how that brat learned his name...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Apparently, open wanted...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...to open WAND to welcome joyboy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If joyboy is the same man that you're waiting for, King...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...then I know who he is.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...? Who is it?

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: luffy will win...!! I know it!!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Do it, momoonsuke- km!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Come forth, flame clouds!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: OBEY ME!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Live Floor, Done Interior, Onigashima

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: AYA!!!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 34 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
